name: Memory (MSAM Bridge)
description: Multi-Stream Adaptive Memory with ACT-R scoring, confidence-gated retrieval, knowledge graph, and cognitive decay.

msamApiKey.description: MSAM API key (optional, uses MSAM_API_KEY env var if set)

agentId.description: Fallback agent ID (runtime ctx.agentId takes precedence)

vocEnabled.description: Enable Value of Computation logging (log-only, never gates LLM)

autoRecall.description: Auto-inject relevant memories before agent starts

enableManagementTools.description: Register memory management tools (forget, update, list, stats)
